slides.title: Empowering Innovation at BIT Gaya Campus
Center of Excellence in Technical Education since 2008

programs.title: AI Web App Generation
programs.description: Build full-stack web applications using AI, Next.js, and Cursor, then deploy them live on Vercel.

programs.title: AI Filmmaking & CGI
programs.description: Produce high-quality videos, talking avatars, CGI assets, and voiceovers using ElevenLabs and Suno.

programs.title: AI Automation & Prompts
programs.description: Master prompt engineering and build automated agent workflows to handle business tasks.

programs.title: AI Digital Marketing
programs.description: Scale content creation, manage Meta advertising lead generation, and design marketing materials using Canva.

faqs.q: What is BIT Gaya AI Udaan?
faqs.a: It is a premium upskilling and innovation platform backed by Buddha Institute of Technology (BIT) Gaya, designed to host hackathons, developer challenges, and tech cohorts.

faqs.q: How do I register for a challenge?
faqs.a: Click on "Register Now" on any of our active flagship challenges, fill out the simple registration form, and form or join a team.

faqs.q: Are the bootcamps online or offline?
faqs.a: We offer hybrid models. Some bootcamps are held in-person at Buddha Institute of Technology campus, while others are entirely virtual.
